abilities.description: Places an enchantment on each attack while activated, causing it to deal additional damage based on how far away the target is. The farther the target, the greater the damage dealt. Deals double damage to creeps and illusions.
abilities.name: Impetus
abilities.story: While Aiushtha favors peaceful means, she is capable of a physical onslaught from a distance, her spears gaining energy from the natural life around her.

abilities.description: Enchantress charms an enemy. If the enemy is a hero, they are slowed and damaged for 5 s. If the enemy is a creep, she brings it under her control, increasing its attack damage and max health. Only one creep can be controlled at a time.
abilities.name: Enchant
abilities.story: A true steward of the forest, Aiushtha befriends all within it - from lowly trolls to powerful centaurs.

abilities.description: A cloud of wisps heals Enchantress and any friendly units nearby. Lasts 9/10/11/12 seconds.
abilities.name: Nature's Attendants
abilities.story: Whimsical spirits of the woods possess a healing power that is quite subtle, but gains strength in numbers.

abilities.description: Leaps backward, and dodges incoming projectiles, and launches an Impetus attack on the 2 furthest enemy units within Enchantress' attack range + 675.
abilities.name: Sproink

abilities.description: Enchantress roots an enemy unit. All creeps, ally, enemy and neutral within a radius will gain bonus movement and attack speed and attack Enchantress' chosen target for 6 seconds.
abilities.name: Little Friends

abilities.description: Enchantress beguiles her enemies, slowing their attacks when she is attacked.
abilities.name: Untouchable
abilities.story: After attacking Aiushtha, most opponents are overwhelmed with guilt having attacked such a natural beauty.

description: Enchants neutral creeps to do her bidding. "Sproink!" Carefree and pure of heart, Aiushtha wanders the forests, listening to the stories of its inhabitants. Nature's Attendants flutter around her, lively sprites that heal critters big and small. When necessary, she Enchants woodland creatures to do her bidding. A perfect image of Untouchable innocence, hunters hesitate to make even the slightest move against Aiushtha. This reluctance is seldom reciprocated. Threats against her Little Friends embolden the Enchantress to break her gentle demeanor, giving her the Impetus to bring those who disturb the peace to a swift and final justice.  Support Pusher Durable Disabler  Arachnophobic, Cute, Female, Fuzzy, Green, Horns, Nose Legs ( 4 )
trivia: Unlike most heroes, Enchantress' attack projectiles and Impetus actually use the model of her equipped cosmetic weapon.
